title: BNY Mellon Alcentra Global Multi-Strategy Credit Fund, Inc. Declares Distribution
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On August 30, 2022, BNY Mellon Alcentra Global Multi-Strategy Credit Fund, Inc. (Ticker: XALCX) today declared a distribution of $1.75 per share of common stock, payable on September 28, 2022 to shareholders of record at the close of business on September 14, 2022. The ex-dividend date is September 13, 2022. The previous dividend declared in May was $1.75 per share of common stock. The Fund intends to distribute all or a portion of its net investment income to common
